title: クライマックス2戦目の後に

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
What an incredible race. My heart won't stop
pounding.
choice_data_list: I felt like I was dreaming.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Come now, Trainer, don't talk like that. That race was reality!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But that just means this journey is far from
over.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Please keep forging onward, as far as you can go!
I'll be there beside you, basking in your brilliance.
choice_data_list:
Yes. <chrname> and I will do our
best!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Wonderful! I eagerly await the next race!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I know you can forge onward, farther and farther!
With you and <chrname> working
together, I'm sure of it!
choice_data_list:
Yes. <chrname> and I will do our
best!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Wonderful! I eagerly await the next race!
